content.en:
This low-level extradimensional thing is a crimson vine that contains very terrifying energy, but compared to the Kunjie Wood Stump that the supreme forces fought with the demon seed abyss, it is not worth mentioning.

However, compared to the Kunjie wood fragments he fused, it was inferior in quality, but it was much more powerful in quantity.

The Kun Realm Wood Fragment he fused with was only a small fragment, and it didn't contain much extradimensional power, which could not support him for a long battle, and it would take a long time to recover.

But the extradimensional power contained in this vine is more than 10,000 times stronger, but the quality is poorer, if it is fused, the power exerted is no less than that of the Kun Realm Wood Fragment.

This is the true complete extradimensional thing!

However, this extradimensional thing already has a certain consciousness and is constantly releasing extradimensional power.

When Ye Tian approached it, this extradimensional thing had already sensed it and was ready to attack him.

Rumble!!!

The vine of this extra-dimensional thing turned into a javelin and stabbed at Ye Tian, containing an incomparably powerful extra-dimensional power.

This is not a powerful move, it is just a simple use of extradimensional power, but even so, it still brought some trouble to Ye Tian.

In an instant, Ye Tian was knocked out, his whole body was cracked, and his body was entangled by a special extradimensional power, constantly affecting his high-level realm god body.

This extra-dimensional power is different from the extra-dimensional power contained in his Kun Realm wood fragments, this extra-dimensional power is extremely domineering, and the corrosion of the physical body is very serious.

However, Ye Tian can hold on for the time being.

Thundered!!!!!

Ye Tian kept fighting with this extradimensional thing, even if the opponent's moves were very shallow, the energy contained in it was too terrifying, causing his injuries to become more and more serious.

Gradually, his body began to lose its bearing.

Eventually, his replica body fell.

"I can't beat it, if I fuse the copy body of the Kun Realm Wood Fragment to come here, I will definitely be able to deal with this extradimensional thing!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he couldn't defeat it, he didn't give up, but let multiple replica bodies come together to besiege this extra-dimensional thing, maybe there was a consciousness that hoped to kill this extra-dimensional thing, so as to take this extra-dimensional thing.

Soon.

Ye Tian's multiple replica bodies arrived, constantly fighting against this extradimensional thing, and even burning the Eternal Dao Seed at all costs.

In this way, a replica body was sacrificed, and it did cause injuries to the extradimensional thing.

However, all of his replica bodies have fallen, and he still has no consciousness to kill extradimensional things.

So, the second batch of his replica bodies came over and continued to besiege this extradimensional object, not giving it a chance to rest and recover.

As a result, the second batch of replica bodies also fell.

But after the arrival of the third batch of replica bodies, Ye Tian had the advantage, but the extra-dimensional thing was still in full decline, and after killing Ye Tian, Ye Tian finally penetrated the body of the extra-dimensional thing, and the consciousness contained in it was obliterated.

......

"Finally killed the consciousness of this extradimensional thing!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

I have to say that the low-level extradimensional things are extremely terrifying and very difficult to subdue.

At the beginning, the Kun Realm Wood Fragment that broke into the Eternal Realm was just a stump of a medium-sized extradimensional thing, making it impossible for a large number of Peak Realm Gods to join forces to break in.

If it weren't for the Demon Seed Abyss mobilizing the hole cards, all the peak Demon Seeds would shoot together, which would have shattered the Kunjie Wood Stump, otherwise he would not have been able to obtain one of the Kunjie Wood Fragments.

The consciousness of the extradimensional thing has been erased, and this extradimensional thing will naturally not be aggressive.

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and grabbed this extradimensional thing directly.

At this moment, he wants to study this extradimensional thing here, trying to fuse it, once the fusion is successful, he can exert the power of extradimensional here, and his strength will inevitably skyrocket.

This extradimensional treasure land rejects the extradimensional things of the outside world, but it certainly does not exclude the extradimensional things here.

As a result, Ye Tian began to fuse this low-level extradimensional thing.

It is not difficult to fuse low-level extra-dimensional things, Ye Tian has also fused them before, but that extra-dimensional thing is from the God of the Netherfire Realm, and it is not a good low-level extra-dimensional thing.

There is also a difference between extra-dimensional things and extra-dimensional things, this extra-dimensional thing is definitely quite good, the energy contained in it is very terrifying, and its effect is no less than that of Kun Realm wood fragments.

Similarly, in order to fuse this extradimensional thing, Ye Tian failed again and again, sacrificing one copy body after another.

After a long time.

"The fusion was successful!"

This extra-dimensional thing had been perfectly integrated into Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Species, and the power of extra-dimensional power gradually appeared on his body.

Compared with the extra-dimensional power of the Kun Realm Wood Fragment, this extra-dimensional power is more attack-powered. []

In the following years, he began to research and create a super-dimensional technique exclusive to this extra-dimensional power, only the extra-dimensional technique can exert the attack power of the super-dimensional power, and the effect is too poor simply by using the extra-dimensional power to attack.

Ye Tian had experience in creating extra-dimensional techniques, and it was not difficult to create new extra-dimensional techniques.

Hundreds of millions of years later, a transcendent technique was created by Ye Tian.

This extradimensional technique was created based on the extradimensional vine of his Kun Realm wood fragments, slightly modified, and focused on the study of the attack aspect.

Today, success has been created.

Airplanes!!!!

A large amount of extradimensional power appeared in Ye Tian's hand, gradually converging into a spear, containing a terrifying edge.

"'Extradimensional Technique-Ultra-Dimensional Vine Light Thorn!'"

A single shot stabbed away, as if the endless extradimensional power gathered a little, instantly penetrating everything, and the attack power instantly skyrocketed many times. (Nord's)

It can be said that the power of this blow is already more powerful than the attack he used to use the Kunjie Wood Fragment.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

And this extra-dimensional thing was also known to him as a super-dimensional red vine!

Now, his strength has skyrocketed, and he has the confidence to explore this super dimensional treasure land.

If he encounters a weaker extradimensional creature again, he will not have no way to compete with one or two, at least he will not be directly killed in seconds like before.

"Start exploring this super dimensional treasure land, there are too many treasures and opportunities here, and it will take a long time to complete the exploration!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he moved on and explored other places.

No, it didn't take long for him to be targeted by extradimensional creatures.

This time, he was targeted by the extra-dimensional creatures so quickly, and he suspected that it was because he had refined the super-dimensional Chilin vine.
